englishDefinitions: Metaphors used to describe life or parts of life in a symbolic way.
Figurative expressions that compare life to something else, such as a journey, a game, or a story.
persianTranslation: تشبیه‌ها و استعاره‌های مربوط به زندگی
examples: Writers often use life metaphors to make ideas easier to understand.
The speech was full of life metaphors about journeys and battles.
Students analyzed the life metaphors in the poem.
